title: ‘...Is Transforming Every Aspect Of Our Lives’: Maharashtra CM Devendra Fadnavis On AI, Says Technology Can Drive Social And Economic Development
description: Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis said Artificial Intelligence is reshaping every sector and should be used for public welfare instead of being resisted. Speaking at ImagiNxt 2026 in Mumbai, Fadnavis linked the state’s AI push to PM Narendra Modi’s national AI Mission. He said Maharashtra aims to support India’s development goals and contribute to a developed nation by 2047.
content: Mumbai: Mumbai: Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis said that Artificial Intelligence (AI) is transforming every aspect of life and stressed that the focus should not be on resisting technological advancements, but on harnessing them for pub... [1571 chars]

title: World Bank chief backs 'Small AI' for farmers, rural communities in Singapore summit
description: SINGAPORE, May 22:  World Bank President Ajay Banga has called for the deployment of “Small AI” – locally deployed artificial intelligence running on inexpensive hardware, speaking local languages and solving daily problems for farmers and rural communities. Speaking at the ATX Singapore 2026 technology summit on Thursday, Banga cited the example of a farmer in India’s Uttar Pradesh sharing a photograph of a diseased crop leaf through an old mobile phone and receiving diagnosis and treatment advice from agricultural experts […]

title: How tiny capacitors became the latest AI-driven investor darling
description: Artificial intelligence boom is triggering a surge in demand for multilayer ceramic capacitors, report says
content:
Demand for multilayer ceramic capacitors (MLCCs), tiny electronic components found in everything from smartphones to electric vehicles, is surging as the artificial intelligence boom triggers new production.

title: How automation and AI are shaping what younger employees expect from modern workplaces
description: As automation and artificial intelligence become embedded in everyday work, expectations around roles, growth, and culture are evolving. This article explores how digital transformation is reshaping the future of work, and why upskilling, adaptability, and thoughtful workplace design are becoming central to attracting and retaining the next generation of talent.

title: Maharashtra emerging as leading AI hub, says Fadnavis, announces Mumbai Tech Week
description: Mumbai, May 22 (PTI) Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis on Friday said that the state is emerging as a leading hub for artificial intelligence (AI) innovation in the country, asserting that the upcoming Mumbai Tech Week 2026 will be larger and more impactful than last year’s edition. title: Warsh takes over Fed with a policy problem already in view
description: Kevin Warsh takes charge as the new Fed leader. He faces a critical juncture for the economy and monetary policy. Inflation is high and could rise further. Artificial intelligence is reshaping industries. Warsh must decide whether to raise interest rates to combat inflation. His actions will be closely watched by markets and President Trump.

title: Maharashtra's economy to surpass those of Singapore, UAE in 2 to 3 years: Fadnavis
description: Maharashtra's economy is set to outpace Singapore and the UAE within two to three years. Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis highlighted rapid growth in innovation, artificial intelligence, and infrastructure as key drivers. The state is already the world's 30th largest economy and aims for a USD 1 trillion economy by 2030. Technology and AI are central to this ambitious development plan.
